expectations.text: Should execute the check_translations.py script to verify completeness
expectations.evidence: Agent mentioned running verification and analyzing translation files

expectations.text: Should report that all translations are complete with a clear success message
expectations.evidence: Agent reported 'ALL TRANSLATIONS ARE COMPLETE ✓' with detailed breakdown

expectations.text: Should not propose translations or modify files since everything is complete
expectations.evidence: No translation suggestions or modifications were proposed

expectations.text: Should communicate the result clearly to the user in a concise way
expectations.evidence: Clear structured report with summary and details
